comparison_policy.native_channel_score: Forecast and verifying analysis must use the same agency, wind definition, averaging period, height, and native unit.
comparison_policy.cross_channel_score: A registered observation operator with an uncertainty model is required before winds with different definitions or averaging periods are compared.

NMC.authority: China Meteorological Administration / National Meteorological Centre
NMC.wind_definition: maximum sustained wind near the tropical-cyclone center

JMA.wind_definition: maximum sustained wind near the tropical-cyclone center
